allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('../NEW ME.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws\); console.log\('Columns:', Object.keys\(data[0]\)\); console.log\('First 5 rows:', JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(0,5\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total rows:', data.length\);")
